_comment: sessiond settings.json — drop into . / ./conf / ~/.config/superset/ as settings.json. Layered with config.yaml if both present (local wins). See config.example.yaml for env-var mapping.

hooks._paused_doc: Default value; sessiond pause/resume persist the override app-wide via gosdk config in ~/.config/superset/settings.local.json

summarizer._model_doc: Verified-existing id as of 2026-07-20; earlier drafts (gemma-4-31b, gemma-3-27b-it) returned 404
